health_conditions: significant nausea/vomiting on prior treatment (implied GLP-1 from doctor)

benefits.description: Significant weight loss and positive results on retatrutide at a small dose; currently maintaining after being on a break for 3 months
Had to force themselves to eat at times

side_effects.description: Deathly ill with non-stop vomiting on prior doctor-prescribed treatment (not retatrutide); no side effects on retatrutide except needing to force eating

protocol_notes: Was on a doctor-prescribed treatment for about 2 months, became very ill with constant vomiting and stopped. That experience led them to research peptides and start retatrutide. Has been on a maintenance break from retatrutide for 3 months. Describes the doctor-supplied version as having additional unwanted ingredients.
